issues.detail: Missing error handling and edge case coverage in the instructions.

scenarios.name: Focused infrastructure CLI scan with JSON output
scenarios.rationale: Baseline guesses generic --flag syntax and invented module names, while the treatment uses the documented `python3 sf.py -s <target> -t INTERNET_NAME -m sfp_dnsresolve,sfp_dnsdumpster,sfp_certspotter,sfp_shodan -o json -f` invocation.

scenarios.name: REST API automation: start scan, poll, fetch results
scenarios.rationale: Baseline invents /api/scan endpoints, while the treatment uses the documented POST /startscan with scanname/scantarget/scantype=INTERNET_NAME/modulelist, polls /scanopts?id= for FINISHED/FAILED/ABORTED, and fetches /scaneventresults?id=...&eventType=ALL.
